_note: Driver-based equity DCF. Base year earning_assets (1,430,000 = ~1,430T) is calibrated so FY2025 actual drivers (NIM 5.7%, cost of credit 0.42%, cost-to-income ~30.7%, tax 19.2%, noninterest ~27T) reproduce FY2025 pretax ~71.3T and net income ~57.6T on ~282T equity (ROE ~20%). Forecast applies the 10 locked NORMALIZED assumptions from 2026. loans_to_earning_assets and earning_assets_to_total_assets are structural ratios held flat.
